concept: I Paused My Podcast for This
title: I Paused My Podcast for This Funny Relatable T-Shirt for Podcast Lovers
description:
Ever find yourself constantly hitting 'pause' on your favorite podcast only to end up in the middle of some utterly disappointing situation? This shirt gets it. It’s a wearable eye-roll for those who’d rather be lost in true crime or deep-diving into the latest niche conspiracy theory. Whether it’s a pointless meeting, a long line, or a conversation you didn’t ask for, let this tee do the talking.

Perfect for:
- Hardcore podcast fans with a sense of humor
- People who’d rather listen than talk
- Anyone who has ever regretted hitting pause

DETAILS:
- Fits true to size with a soft, breathable fabric for all-day comfort.
- Comes in two print variants: crisp dark inks for light shirts and vibrant neon fills for dark shirts.
- Features clean, bold typography centered on the chest for maximum visibility.
- Made-to-order design that speaks volumes without saying a word.

100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
Tumble dry: low heat
Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
